name: Chinese Basic Steamed Bun Dough
recipeIngredient: -Sugar (4 tbsp; more or less - I prefer a sweeter dough)
recipeInstructions: This recipe makes about 8 - 10 buns. A slightly sweet dough with bacon flavoring creates a more interesting steamed bun. Fillings can include stir-fry meats or vegetables. Thicken the sauce of the stir-fry meats with cornstarch for added flavor. Slightly overseason the fillings as desired. The steamed buns may be dense; ensure proper mixing to achieve the best result.
